methods.description: Standard analytical techniques used to characterize the physical and spectroscopic properties of chemical compounds, including optical rotation, UV, NMR, and mass spectrometry, as well as chromatographic methods for separation and analysis.

steps.description: Optical rotations were measured on a Perkin-Elmer 343 polarimeter (Perkin Elmer, Waltham, MA, USA).
steps.searchable_summary: Measure optical rotation of a sample using a polarimeter.

steps.description: UV spectra were recorded on a Specord UV−vis spectrometer (Carl Zeiss, Jena, Germany) in methanol.
steps.searchable_summary: Record UV-vis spectrum of a sample in methanol.

steps.description: NMR spectra were recorded in CDCl 3 , acetone-d 6 and DMSO-d 6 with Bruker DPX-500 (Bruker BioSpin GmbH, Rheinstetten, Germany) and Bruker DRX-700 (Bruker BioSpin GmbH, Rheinstetten, Germany) spectrometers, using TMS as an internal standard.
steps.searchable_summary: Record NMR spectra (e.g., 1H, 13C) of a sample in specified deuterated solvents using Bruker spectrometers with TMS standard.

steps.description: HRESIMS spectra were measured on a Maxis impact mass spectrometer (Bruker Daltonics GmbH, Rheinstetten, Germany).
steps.searchable_summary: Measure High-Resolution Electrospray Ionization Mass Spectrometry (HRESIMS) spectrum of a sample.

steps.description: Low-pressure liquid column chromatography was performed using silica gel (50/100 µm, Imid, Russia).
steps.searchable_summary: Perform low-pressure liquid column chromatography using silica gel for sample separation.
outputs: Separated fractions of the sample mixture

steps.description: Plates (4.5 cm × 6.0 cm) precoated with silica gel (5-17 µm, Imid) were used for thin-layer chromatography.
steps.searchable_summary: Perform thin-layer chromatography (TLC) using precoated silica gel plates for sample analysis or reaction monitoring.

steps.description: Preparative HPLC was carried out with a Shimadzu LC-20 chromatograph (Shimadzu USA Manufacturing, Canby, OR, USA) using YMC ODS-AM (YMC Co., Ishikawa, Japan) (5 µm, 10 mm × 250 mm) and YMC SIL (YMC Co., Ishikawa, Japan) (5 µm, 10 mm × 250 mm) columns with a Shimadzu RID-20A refractometer (Shimadzu Corporation, Kyoto, Japan).
steps.searchable_summary: Perform preparative High-Performance Liquid Chromatography (HPLC) using specified Shimadzu system, YMC ODS-AM or YMC SIL columns, and a refractive index detector for sample purification.
outputs: Purified fractions of the sample mixture
